---
title: "05-Capacity-bene"
---


```{r}

bra_cap <- tibble::tribble(
  ~APT_ICAO, ~YEAR, ~MAX_CAP
  ,"SBGR",  2025 , 60
  ,"SBGL",  2025 , 60
  ,"SBRJ",  2025 , 29
  ,"SBCF",  2025 , 37
  ,"SBBR",  2025 , 80
  ,"SBSV",  2025 , 36
  ,"SBKP",  2025 , 40
  ,"SBSP",  2025 , 44
  ,"SBCT",  2025 , 32
  ,"SBPA",  2025 , 36
  ,"SBRF",  2025 , 38
  ,"SBEG",  2025 , 38
)

```
